title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Dalmia Bharat

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Dalmia Bharat
jsonLd.description:
We at Dalmia Bharat are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dalmia Bharat:
Dalmia Bharat is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat!
